focus: Rwanda tax-benefit surface: employment income tax (PAYE), lump-sum/presumptive small-business tax, rental income tax, RSSB contributions (pension, occupational hazards, maternity, RAMA, CBHI, MMI), VAT, excise duties, and the VUP Direct Support, school feeding, Girinka and fuel-subsidy transfers.
purpose: Household-level comparison-oracle and supporting-source references for Rwanda Axiom coverage. None of these are legal authority.
oracle_scope: A RuleSpec oracle must be an executable, pinned external calculator that accepts household-level inputs and returns household-level tax-benefit outputs comparable to Axiom outputs. Aggregate simulators, distributional reports, parameter documentation, and public model summaries are supporting references only, not oracles.

oracles.name: RWAMOD
oracles.dataset: none shipped (rw_2017_a2 / rw_2024_a1 are registered in the bundle's dataset config without data files); per-case probes run an external synthetic DataFrame under the registered dataset name against the engine's 450-variable input schema
oracles.role: Household-level tax-benefit comparison oracle for Rwanda. RWAMOD is the SOUTHMOD tax-benefit microsimulation model for Rwanda (UNU-WIDER). Built on the EUROMOD platform; systems RW_2017-RW_2025.

availability_check.detail: The licensed SOUTHMOD A4.0 bundle held under the Adhesion Agreement for the Ghana lane also carries RWAMOD with systems RW_2017-RW_2025 but ships no Rwandan input microdata (the registered dataset names have no data files; personal links; non-redistributable; the bundle must never be committed or shared). The EUROMOD-engine runtime is proven from the Ghana lane (x86_64 py3.12 venv + euromod 0.2.18 + x64 .NET 10), and per-case probes are proven for Rwanda by synthesizing the engine's input schema: a 450-variable column list assembled by seeding from a sister SOUTHMOD dataset header and adding engine-reported unknown variables until a clean RW_2025 run (recorded at ~/.axiom/oracles/southmod/harness-rw/rwamod/rw_schema.json), with an external DataFrame passed under a registered dataset name. The RW_2025 policy-surface inventory (36 policies, ~17 active instruments) is recorded at ~/.axiom/oracles/southmod/harness-rw/rwamod/inventory_result.json.
